channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Apple tipped to add vapor chamber cooling to the iPhone 17 to prevent overheating
item.description: The latest iPhone 17 rumor suggests the four phones are going to feature a next-level cooling system.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Many firms see cyberattacks as their top business concern this year
item.description: Businesses are worried about cyber incidents and business outages, including ongoing geopolitical conflict.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: SpaceX loses spacecraft after catching rocket booster at the launch pad in latest Starship test
item.description: By MARCIA DUNN SpaceX launched its Starship rocket on its latest test flight Thursday, but the spacecraft was destroyed following a thrilling booster catch back at the pad.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Biden's new executive order aims to shore up US cyber defenses
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Joe Biden issued an executive order Thursday aimed at strengthening the nation's cybersecurity and making it easier to go after foreign adversaries or hacking groups that try to compromise U.S. internet and telecommunication systems.
item.dc:creator: DAVID KLEPPER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Nvidia intros new guardrail microservices for agentic AI
item.description: Nvidia today added new Nvidia inference microservices (NIMs) for AI guardrails to its Nvidia NeMo Guardrails software tools.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Digital Transformation in Prisons: How Kazakhstan is Leading the Way
item.description: Technology innovations have made the digital transformation of public services essential to enhancing safety, efficiency, and accountability.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Biden won't enforce TikTok ban, official says, leaving fate of app to Trump
item.description: President Joe Biden won’t enforce a ban on the social media app TikTok that is set to take effect a day before he leaves office, a U.S. official says.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Red Hat offers OpenShift Virtualization Engine, Kubernetes Connectivity Link
item.description: Red Hat has made both its Red Hat OpenShift Virtualization Engine and Red Hat Connectivity Link software generally available. The company also announced Red Hat Advanced Cluster Management for Virtualization.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Get ready to experience thrill of eVTOL racing
item.description: The Jetson One eVTOL showcases air racing potential, ushering in a new aviation era. Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson says the race for eVTOL supremacy is just beginning.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Where big piles of mud come from
item.description: I’ve worked on some big piles of mud over the years. You know, those sprawling applications made up of millions of lines of code, written by countless developers over the course of a decade or two, most of them long forgotten and utterly unknown to the current team.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Why you should use Docker and OCI containers
item.description: A book published in 1981, called Nailing Jelly to a Tree, describes software as “nebulous and difficult to get a firm grip on.” That was true in 1981, and it is no less true four decades later.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Court lets Tennessee porn site age verification law take effect as Texas law goes to Supreme Court
item.description: NASHVILLE, Tenn. (AP) — A panel of appeals judges has ruled that Tennessee can begin enforcing a law that requires pornographic websites to verify their visitors’ age as the First Amendment debate rises to the U.S. Supreme Court this week for oral arguments over a similar Texas law.
item.dc:creator: JONATHAN MATTISE, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: At CES, PC makers aim for business, highlight AI-ready hardware
item.description: Enterprise computers are often the ugly ducklings of the PC world, viewed as dull, slow and less feature-rich than their consumer counterparts.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: US TikTok users flock to Chinese app Xiaohongshu in protest with TikTok ban looming
item.description: HONG KONG (AP) — As the threat of a TikTok ban looms, U.S. TikTok users are flocking to the Chinese social media app Xiaohongshu – making it the top downloaded app in the U.S.
item.dc:creator: ZEN SOO, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Shape-shifting AI Transformer homes will leave you wanting one
item.description: AC Future and Pininfarina unveil AI Transformer homes, merging sustainability and innovation. Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson says this could change the way we think about home.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: The cloud cost wake-up call I predicted
item.description: For years, I’ve cautioned organizations about the hidden downsides of cloud computing. Ironically, I’m “Dave the cloud guy” who warns enterprises about the cloud. The benefits of the cloud’s agility, scalability, and innovation can quickly become a financial sinkhole without proper management.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: New Brazil law restricts use of smartphones in elementary and high schools
item.description: SAO PAULO (AP) — Brazil's President Luiz Inácio Lula da Silva on Monday signed a bill restricting the use of smartphones at school, following a global trend for such limitations. The move will impact students at elementary and high schools across the South American nation starting in February.
item.dc:creator: MAURICIO SAVARESE and DIARLEI RODRIGUES, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: 5-minute cleanup for your phone and computer
item.description: Technology expert Kim Komando shares her easy tips on how to declutter your phones, computers and devices from the files you no longer need.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Massive Volkswagen Data Leak Exposes 800,000 EV Owners' Personal Info
item.description: Volkswagen's subsidiary software company Cariad had a massive data leak that exposed the personal info of around 800,000 EV owners online and accessible for months.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Red Hat completes Neural Magic acquisition
item.description: Jan. 13, 2025 update: Red Hat announced it has completed its acquisition of Neural Magic, a pioneer in software and algorithms that accelerate gen AI inference workloads. Red Hat first announced its intent to acquire the company on Nov. 12, 2024. Today’s announcement confirms the close of the deal.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Britain's leader unveils AI strategy, including vow to rip up red tape hindering AI projects
item.description: LONDON (AP) — The British government pledged on Monday to rip up the red tape hindering construction of data centers that underpin artificial intelligence while promoting its “pro-innovation” approach to regulating the technology.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: The future of trucking rolls forward in Shell's experimental big rig
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson takes a closer look at Shell's Starship 3.0: A natural gas big rig boosting efficiency 2.5 times, proving greener trucking.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Prime Video's use of AI, Next Gen Stats on NFL games is helping viewers understand the game better
item.description: CULVER CITY, Calif. (AP) — The Los Angeles Rams defense appeared to be content to drop back in coverage and prevent San Francisco’s Brock Purdy from completing a Hail Mary on the final play of their Thursday night game on Dec. 12. The broadcast on Amazon Prime Video saw it differently, though.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Oracle refuses to yield JavaScript trademark, Deno Land says
item.description: JavaScript runtime provider Deno Land’s efforts to get Oracle to yield the trademark for JavaScript have hit a snag, with Oracle refusing to voluntarily withdraw the trademark, Deno Land said.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: UAE company to invest $20B in U.S. AI data centers
item.description: A United Arab Emirates investment firm has pledged $20 billion to build new data centers targeting AI across a number of locations across the United States.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Nvidia year in review
item.description: 2024 was Nvidia’s year. Its command of mindshare and market share was unequaled among tech vendors. Here’s a recap of some of the key events of 2024 that highlight just how powerful the world’s most dominant chip player is.
item.dc:creator: Network World
